title: Max Payne 3
short_description: A cinematic third-person shooter developed across multiple Rockstar studios, including Rockstar North.
description: Max Payne 3 is a third-person shooter developed collaboratively across multiple Rockstar Games studios — including Rockstar North — collectively credited as Rockstar Studios, and published by Rockstar Games. Released in 2012, it follows a burnt-out Max Payne working as a private security contractor in São Paulo, Brazil. The game retained the series' signature bullet-time mechanic and introduced a polished cinematic presentation.
